all amount fields were expanded from S9(7) to S9(9). 
SHORT NAME: ESRDSETG 
LONG NAME: ESRD_REV_SETG_CHRG_AMT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
MedPAR (derived) 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
This field is derived by accumulating the revenue center total charge amount associated with revenue 
center codes 080x, 082x–088x from all claim records included in the stay.
